title: Hungary sends team for pipeline talks denied by Ukraine
summary_full: Kyiv said it was aware that a group of Hungarians had crossed the border but stressed there was no plan for talks with officials
summary_public: Kyiv said it was aware that a group of Hungarians had crossed the border but stressed there was no plan for talks with officials
